markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games' repeated delays have extended GTA VI's launch to November 19, 2026, creating a long window for other major events to resolve first in this high-volume Polymarket. Recent official announcements from Rockstar and Take-Two confirm the date remains firm after earlier shifts from a 2025 target, with marketing expected to intensify over the summer. Traders focus on verifiable milestones such as geopolitical developments, major music releases, and technology launches that could occur ahead of the game's arrival in Vice City. The extended timeline heightens uncertainty around cultural and industry timing, while Rockstar's track record of polish-driven postponements continues to shape expectations for what might unfold beforehand.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York retrial, declared May 15 after a hung jury on the Jessica Mann rape charge, has reinforced trader expectations that the disgraced producer may avoid further incarceration. With his 2020 New York conviction already overturned and a 16-year Los Angeles sentence under appeal before a skeptical panel, market-implied odds heavily favor no prison time at 75.3%. Weinstein’s advanced age, recent heart surgery, and reported bone cancer diagnosis add momentum, as health-related release or compassionate considerations become plausible factors. Ongoing appeals and repeated prosecutorial setbacks create substantial uncertainty around any additional time served, outweighing historical precedent for lengthy sentences in similar high-profile cases.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2025-26 Stanley Cup race remains tightly contested between the Vegas Golden Knights and Carolina Hurricanes because both clubs have advanced to their conference finals while showcasing strong regular-season form and playoff momentum. Vegas holds a 2-0 series lead over the Colorado Avalanche in the West, capitalizing on depth scoring and defensive structure to shorten their implied probability. Carolina responded to an opening loss by evening its Eastern series against the Montreal Canadiens with an overtime victory, reflecting consistent goaltending and special-teams execution. The Avalanche have fallen sharply after early postseason struggles, while the Canadiens' surprising run has produced limited upside against deeper competition. These recent results align with the current trader consensus reflected in the market pricing.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Vegas Golden Knights win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2025-26 Stanley Cup race remains tightly contested between the Vegas Golden Knights and Carolina Hurricanes because both clubs have advanced to their conference finals while showcasing strong regular-season form and playoff momentum. Vegas holds a 2-0 series lead over the Colorado Avalanche in the West, capitalizing on depth scoring and defensive structure to shorten their implied probability. Carolina responded to an opening loss by evening its Eastern series against the Montreal Canadiens with an overtime victory, reflecting consistent goaltending and special-teams execution. The Avalanche have fallen sharply after early postseason struggles, while the Canadiens' surprising run has produced limited upside against deeper competition. These recent results align with the current trader consensus reflected in the market pricing.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: Oklahoma City Thunder traders hold the strongest position in the 2026 NBA Championship market due to the team's league-best 64-18 regular-season record, back-to-back contention, and defensive rating that leads the NBA. Recent Western Conference Finals play against the San Antonio Spurs, who posted 62 wins and a potent young core, has kept the series competitive and supported the Spurs' implied probability. In the East, the New York Knicks' strong playoff positioning and consistent form elevate their chances relative to other conference contenders. The Cleveland Cavaliers' minimal share reflects their lower standing and limited path through a deep bracket. These outcomes reflect trader consensus on current roster health, recent momentum, and playoff matchups.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: France and Spain sit virtually tied atop the market as the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaches, reflecting their status as European champions and consistent performers in recent qualifiers and Nations League matches. Spain’s blend of experienced leaders and emerging talents like Lamine Yamal has sustained momentum, while France benefits from Didier Deschamps’ proven system and a deep pool of world-class players seeking redemption from the 2022 final. England’s perfect qualification record under Thomas Tuchel and strong recent form place it third, followed closely by Portugal and Brazil, whose attacking depth keeps them in contention. The expanded 48-team field and co-hosting in North America introduce scheduling and travel variables, yet the top European sides’ squad quality and head-to-head pedigree maintain the tight clustering among favorites.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: France and Spain sit virtually tied atop the market as the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaches, reflecting their status as European champions and consistent performers in recent qualifiers and Nations League matches. The expanded 48-team field and co-hosting in North America introduce scheduling and travel variables, yet the top European sides’ squad quality and head-to-head pedigree maintain the tight clustering among favorites.

Key differentiators include primary-state polling trends, early donor consolidation, and positioning on issues like economic policy and party coalition building. Factors that could shift probabilities involve major endorsements, debate performances, or unexpected withdrawals that narrow the field before 2028 primaries begin.

markets.question: Will Roy Cooper win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.
